favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Massage and restaurant are among the special facilities that will enhance your stay with on-site convenience.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Will choose this hotel again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Great team & very helpful toward all the visitor.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Once you open our door you can see the ocean. Great staff with great chef.
Very helpful although it is not include in their service. :) Keep a good work.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
1. Limited and unecducated staff with a very low EQ.  
2. Ac spolit and request chg of room.  They request to change and gibe me standing fan. The entire hotel had 1 or 2 guest only.
3. Room not clean at all. Lizard and insects are plents
4. Islamic fanatics. Prayer chatting si loid at 5am.
Totally disappointment

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
Literally, the worst place I have ever stayed. Definitely would have preferred to have saved my money and stayed in a ratty youth hostel instead.

1. Far too many bugs in the room.
2. Walls are very thin and could not sleep until the family next door settled down for the night.
3. No toilet paper was provided for check-in.
4. Mostly empty water cooler placed in room.
5. Internet was often down and was not very strong when it was up. I usually only had 1 Mb / s.
6. Staff was unable to fix the internet and was unwilling to refund my money.
7. Internet is effectively not available in the room and comes from the reception area.

My trip to Pulau Weh was ruined and cut short by this miserable property. Please do not stay here.
comments.reviewTitle: Worthless internet connection (Wifi) and worthless staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 2 travelers found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
No observable reception so we were unsure where to check in,who to request for additional toiletries etc. Fortunately, the staff were passing by the front door when they spotted us. 
We check in at 3pm but our booked additional mattress only come at almost 6pm. Seemed unprepared. 
Moldy spots on ceiling
No toiletries provided. Water is provided a-plenty. 
Tv not working but we couldn't bother to find the staff to adjust it. 
Pillow is musty.
comments.reviewTitle: Will try other options before coming back

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The view from our room was breathtaking, although the location (Iboih) quite far from the jetty..around 1 hour van ride. But it was really worth it because this place is so near to beautiful beache like Pantai Rubiah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: dissapointed as there is no iron provided, no toothbrush, no toothpaste provided, not enough of pillow and towel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Overall the hotel was good

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Gud location,closer to pulai rubiah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Chambres sans charme, pas de vue, literie douteuse, petits vers rouges dans la salle de bain. Beurk
comments.reviewTitle: Très mauvais comparé aux autres hébergements

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Wifi cuma ada dibahagian lobi shj.. perkhidmatan spt sewa supir, sewa motor, sewa alatan snorkeling juga disediakan.. lunch dan dinner juga ada tetapi dikenakan caj tambahan cuma utk book tiada di agoda means kena call.. view sgt nice.. waktu malam tidak sunyi..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Dah book hotel kt agoda. Tapi bila sampai hotel staf xcheck pon no booking di agoda, dan bagi bilik yang berlainan. So aku tunjuk jenis bilik seperti yang dah booked. At last dapat jgk bilik tu. Toilet pon berbau, pastu boleh plak black out sbb angin kuat. Dugaan btol!Sape yang nak snorkelling di Iboih aku suggest 1 malam je duk area Iboih ni, next day tu better duk area Pulau Sabang, situ byk skit choice makanan..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Dan saya diberi kamar penginapan "star" berkaca kelihatan dari luar sungguh tidak nyaman.
comments.reviewTitle: bad bad bad! saya pesan di Agoda untuk arpen bungalow. ternyata dijual lagi ke orang lain.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Staf hotel yang tidak begitu ramah, sewaktu mau check in kamar masih dibersihkan dengan cleaning staf yang hanya 1 orang untuk 3 kamar.
Untuk lokasi sangat strategis dekat dengan pantat dan pelabuhan iboih.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I love this place, dekat dengan pulau rubiah dan berada dipinggir pantai, fasilitas cukup memuaskan, tempat parkir luas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: rekomended untuk yang ingin berlibur di pulau sabang, kamar bagus dan bersih, pegawainya sangat ramah dan pelayanannya bagus sekali, apa yg kita butuhkan mereka dapat menyediakannya...
